calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Christian Martinez, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Svitla Systems, Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Daniel Kaufman, Brooklyn Labs, LLC,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

Witness, Nichole Carmichael, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $39,355.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $1,151.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $40,506.40

Court Granted Plaintiff's Oral Motion to Dismiss Causes of Action for Breach of Implied Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing, Fraud, and Negligent Misrepresentation.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Continued To Sep-28-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Jul-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
